overview: A specialty clinic offering hormone replacement therapy and related healthcare services in Phoenix, Denver, and Salt Lake City. Focuses on serving the LGBTQIA+ community and its allies, with additional services for men with low testosterone.
highlights: Gender affirming hormone therapy and testosterone replacement therapy
HIV care, PrEP, and STI/STD testing and treatment
targetAudience: Primarily the LGBTQIA+ community and its allies; also serves cisgender men with low testosterone.
